emails.body: FW: Susan Elledge will be here for a while but is planning to leave about 3 unless you have stuff for her to do. I don't think we'll have anything for you today. I know you'll be so upset that you aren't needed today. Thanks for asking. Marie To: Heard, Marie

emails.body: RE: Susan Elledge will be here for a while but is planning to leave about 3 unless you have stuff for her to do. Yes, I'm crushed! I'll be here Monday, but if I don't see you or any of your group, have a happy New Year! Susan To: Elledge, Susan
